hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) command -v eslint >/dev/null 2>&1 && eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1 || (command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx --no-install eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1) || true ;; *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix "$f" && ruff format "$f" 2>&1 || true ;; esac

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q '"stop_hook_active": *true' && exit 0; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; echo "Uncommitted changes are present. Before ending, run THIS project's own verification — its tests / build / lint, or its validate script — and show the output as evidence, then commit. Verification is part of done. If the project genuinely has no such check, say so in one line and stop." >&2; exit 2
